import io
import string
import list

fn add_unique(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, v)
    xs
  else
    list.push(xs, v)
  end
end

fn try_add(_ xs: List<Int>, _ cur: String) -> List<Int>
  match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(v)
    add_unique(xs, v)
  when None
    xs
  end
end

fn byte_of(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut tokens: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = byte_of(input, i)
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      tokens = try_add(tokens, cur)
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(cur)
  tokens = try_add(tokens, cur)
end

mut remaining = tokens
mut sorted_list: List<Int> = []
while remaining.len() > 0
  mut min_val = 0
  mut first = true
  for v in remaining
    if first
      min_val = v
      first = false
    else if v < min_val
      min_val = v
    end
  end
  sorted_list = list.push(sorted_list, min_val)
  mut new_remaining: List<Int> = []
  mut skipped = false
  for v in remaining
    if v == min_val and not skipped
      skipped = true
    else
      new_remaining = list.push(new_remaining, v)
    end
  end
  remaining = new_remaining
end

mut out = ""
mut is_first = true
for v in sorted_list
  if is_first
    out = "#{v}"
    is_first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end
println(out)
